originalTitle: ARK Tides of Fortune & Dragontopia Trailer
content: Set sail, take flight, and step into two massive new ARK adventures: ARK Tides of Fortune and ARK: Dragontopia, each bringing a distinct new frontier of survival, exploration, creatures, combat, and progression to the ARK universe. ARK Tides of Fortune Pull up a chair, Survivors. Everyone knows the legendary ARK veteran Bob - played by Karl Urban - but you haven't truly heard a tale until you've survived his swashbuckling exploits on the high seas. Hoist the sails and experience his next chapter of incredibly true adventures in ARK Tides of Fortune! The simulated ocean of Genesis Ascended Part 1 has opened into a massive, map-wide nautical frontier. Chart a course across a vast sea, hunt for buried treasure, and clash with treacherous enemies in explosive naval combat. The new weapons, structures, cosmetics, and exotic creatures included in Tides of Fortune can be unleashed across the ARK universe, but the deep physics-driven waters of Genesis are where this swashbuckling arsenal truly comes alive. ARK Tides of Fortune - Steam https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558480/ARK_Tides_of_Fortune/ ARK Tides of Fortune - Xbox https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/ark-tides-of-fortune/9NW717HPJDK9 ARK Tides of Fortune - PlayStation https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0691-PPSA16810_00-TIDESOFFORTUNE01 ARK: Dragontopia Tame the legends and rule the skies! Awaken within a cloudbound paradise where the earth has fractured into a world of floating islands, and myths take flight. High above these magical grounds, Survivors must learn a new rhythm of survival alongside the true rulers of the sky: dragons. Across a vast aerial ecosystem, ARK: Dragontopia invites you to step off the edge and master the skies. Guided by the echoes of a lost order of dragonriders, you’ll enter a land where legends breathe anew. As a fierce new threat claims the horizon, it is up to you to restore balance! LORDS OF THE SKY Between the sun and moon, the skies teem with draconic legends. Encounter titanic behemoths that devour resources and enemies alike, elegant wind-dancing steeds that gallop across the clouds, deadly four-winged assassins, multi-headed beasts of dual-breathed chaos, and loyal shoulder-drakes that guard you on your journey. Every dragon demands its own path to taming, requiring you to observe, learn, and master their unique rhythms before they ever let you take the saddle. THE DRAGONTOPIA ECOSYSTEM To survive this high-altitude frontier, you’ll need to grow through the Dragon Skill Trees, a new progression system built around strengthening your bond with these mythical beasts. Craft specialized gear, wield potent tools, and expand your base with a draconic tileset, incubator backpacks, and mysterious potion stations. But these skies are contested, and you are the realm’s last hope to break the vanguard of a ruthless airborne invader! The dragons are waking, the islands are calling, and the Skies of Dragontopia are yours to claim! Dragonntopia - Steam https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558490/ARK_Dragontopia/ Dragonntopia - Xbox https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/ark-dragontopia/9NB7PMZ290KX/0010 Dragonntopia - PlayStation https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0691-PPSA16810_00-DRAGONTOPIADLC01 For the latest on everything ARK: Survival Ascended: Tweet us at https://www.twitter.com/survivetheark Hang out on Discord at https://discord.gg/playark Watch us tame on Twitch at https://www.twitch.tv/survivetheark Like us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/survivetheark/ Visit the Website: http://playark.com Community Hub: http://www.survivetheark.com Subreddit: https://www.reddit.com/r/playark Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/survivetheark
chineseTitle: | 方 | 舟 | ： | 财 | 富 | 之 | 潮 | 和 | 龙 | 之 | 国 | 预 | 告 | 片 |
chineseSummary: 方舟：生存登高 · 57,609 次观看
chineseContent: 扬帆起航，踏入两个全新的方舟冒险之旅：《方舟财富之潮》和《方舟：龙之国》，每一款都为方舟宇宙带来了生存、探索、生物、战斗和进步的独特新领域。方舟：财富之潮 幸存者们，请拉开椅子。每个人都知道传奇方舟老兵鲍勃（由卡尔·厄本饰演），但只有当你从他在公海的虚张声势的功绩中幸存下来之前，你才算真正听说过这个故事。扬起风帆，在《方舟：财富之潮》中体验他令人难以置信的真实冒险的新篇章！ 《创世纪 Ascended 第 1 部分》中的模拟海洋已开辟为一片广阔的、覆盖整个地图的航海边界。在浩瀚的海洋中制定航线，寻找埋藏的宝藏，并在爆炸性的海战中与奸诈的敌人发生冲突。 《财富之潮》中包含的新武器、结构、装饰品和奇异生物可以在方舟宇宙中释放，但创世纪物理驱动的深层水域才是这个虚张声势的军火库真正活跃起来的地方。方舟财富之潮 - Steam https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558480/ARK_Tides_of_Fortune/ 方舟财富之潮 - Xbox https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/ark-tides-of-fortune/9NW717HPJDK9 方舟财富之潮 - PlayStation https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0691-PPSA16810_00-TIDESOFFORTUNE01 方舟：龙托邦 驯服传说，统治天空！在云雾缭绕的天堂中醒来，地球已经分裂成一个漂浮岛屿的世界，神话开始飞翔。在这些神奇的土地之上，幸存者必须与天空的真正统治者：龙一起学习新的生存节奏。穿越广阔的空中生态系统，方舟：龙之邦邀请您走出边缘，主宰天空。在失落的龙骑士团的回声的引导下，你将进入
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
